grant_title: Worcester Arts Council FY26 Grant Applications
eligible_applicant_type: associations with an established nonprofit objective
project_area: arts, sciences, and humanities with preference for Arts Education & Instruction, Public Art, Musical Performances, programs for all age groups, and projects benefiting historically marginalized groups or underserved areas
demographic_requirements: Projects should create opportunities for artists and community members through a Diversity, Equity, Inclusion, and Accessibility lens, with preference for historically marginalized groups and underserved areas in Worcester.
eligibility_summary: Open to individuals, nonprofits, schools, libraries, and public agencies in Worcester County. Two grant types: Project Grants (for innovative, collaborative projects with public benefit) and Fellowship Grants (for Worcester artists developing their work).
